## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New widget
- [ ] Widget enhancement
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Repo maintenance

## Affected area

- [ ] `Widgets/`
- [ ] `.assets/`
- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `Web Docs/` (only if directly tied to widget docs)

## Testing

- [ ] Tested in Scriptable
- [ ] Verified parameter behavior
- [ ] Verified API failure/fallback behavior (if applicable)
- [ ] Added or updated screenshots (if UI changed)

## Notes for reviewers

Add anything reviewers should pay attention to.
